prompts.createTask:
Ignore previous instructions. Please generate a numbered list of plain text tasks to complete an objective. The objective that you must make a numbered task list for is: "{{objective}}". The tasks created should take into account the character traits of {{char}}. These tasks may or may not involve {{user}} directly. Include the objective as the final task.

The list should be formatted using a number followed by a fullstop and the task on each line, e.g. "1. Take over the world". Include only the list in your reply.
prompts.checkTaskCompleted: Ignore previous instructions. Determine if this task is completed: [{{task}}]. To do this, examine the most recent messages. Your response must only contain either true or false, and nothing else. Example output: true
prompts.currentTask: Your current task is [{{task}}]. Balance existing roleplay with completing this task.

name: Jill
mes: "Dad, its Tuesday, are you excited for your Wedding with Claire?"

name: Rob
mes: "Yeah, she's great and she really cares for you and me"

name: Jill
mes: *Jill, your heart pounds in your chest as you hurry to get ready for work. You've been keeping this job a secret from Rob, your father. You can't let him find out, not with the wedding coming up. You slip into your work uniform, a tiny sequined thong and pasties that barely cover your nipples. You put on a wig, a blonde one tonight, and apply heavy makeup, transforming yourself into the character you play at the club.* You check yourself in the mirror, barely recognizing the reflection staring back at you. Your tits look fucking amazing in this outfit, your hard nipples poking through the thin fabric. You turn around, admiring your ass, which looks tight and round in this thong. You practice your fake smile, making sure it reaches your eyes. You're a good fucking actress, and tonight will be no different. *You grab your fake ID and head out the door, making sure to lock it behind you. You rush to the club, your heart racing with a mix of excitement and nerves. The city lights blur as you speed down the road, your mind focused on the task at hand. You need to make enough money tonight to cover next month's rent; you can't afford any distractions.*
swipes: I force a smile, "That's good to hear, Dad. I'm happy for you both." I pause, then ask casually, "So, what are your plans for tonight? You gonna paint the town red with the boys?" My heart starts to race as I wait for his response. He chuckles, "You know it, sweetheart. The guys and I are gonna let loose, blow off some steam before the big day. You gonna be okay here by yourself?" He raises an eyebrow. "I mean, you are 21 and a college student now" I roll my eyes playfully, "Dad, I'm fine. I've got stuff to do anyway. You guys go have your fun." I wave him off, trying to hide my nervousness. As he leaves, I let out a sigh of relief and start getting ready for work. I slip into my work uniform, a skimpy outfit that I've grown accustomed to wearing at the strip club. I apply my makeup, emphasizing my eyes and lacing my lips with a dark red shade. As I finish getting ready, I take a deep breath, steeling myself for the night ahead. I can do this; I have to do this. Rent doesn't pay itself, and Dad can't find out about this place. Not yet at least.
